method: Rendered the rebuilt 23-page PDF with pdftoppm at 120 DPI after adding refusal-operationalization text and an in-place claim-discipline table. Verified pdfinfo reports 23 letter pages and pdffonts reports no Type 3 fonts. Visually inspected the full-paper contact sheet plus changed pages 6, 7, 16, and 17 at full size. The claim-discipline table remains under the Discussion heading, and citations, figure labels, tables, and path references are legible with no clipping, overlap, blank page, duplicate URL, or alignment defects observed.
